Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO HIGHER EDUCATION
REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Expands how applicants may qualify for a license to be a dentist
Summary: Expands how applicants may qualify for a license to be a dentist to include postdoctoral specialty programs and advanced education programs in general dentistry.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to licensing requirements for prospective dentists
